nodes.label: QA Reporter
nodes.description: Chrome extension + NestJS API + Next.js dashboard for QA teams to capture UI bugs in-context from any web page

nodes.label: Chrome Extension (MV3)
nodes.description: Manifest V3 Chrome extension — the capture tool. Opens as a side panel, stays open across navigation. Handles element selection, screenshot capture, bug reporting form, and issue buffer.

nodes.label: NestJS Backend API
nodes.description: NestJS API running on port 4000 with global prefix /api. Handles JWT validation, issue creation, screenshot upload, workspace settings, and integrations.

nodes.label: Next.js Web Platform
nodes.description: Next.js 14 dashboard (port 3000) with TailwindCSS. Provides project management, issue list/detail, connectors hub, extension settings page.

nodes.label: Supabase
nodes.description: PostgreSQL database, Auth (ES256 JWT), and Storage (private bucket for screenshots). Used as the data and auth layer.

nodes.label: sidepanel.js
nodes.description: Primary extension UI logic — auth, recording controls, buffer list. Sends messages to background.js and content.js.

nodes.label: background.js (Service Worker)
nodes.description: MV3 service worker handling message routing, API calls, token refresh, screenshot capture (captureVisibleTab), and keyboard shortcut (⌥⇧Q).

nodes.label: content.js
nodes.description: Injected into target pages. Manages hover highlighting, in-page draggable modal near clicked element, screenshot pipeline (crop/highlight modes), CSS selector + XPath generation, React component detection, console/network error capture.

nodes.label: Azure DevOps Integration
nodes.description: Backend integration that encrypts PAT (AES-256-GCM) at rest, creates work items, and syncs issues. PAT never returned to frontend in plaintext.

nodes.label: Encryption Service
nodes.description: AES-256-GCM encrypt/decrypt for Personal Access Tokens (PATs). Located at backend/src/integrations/encryption.service.ts.

nodes.label: Workspace Settings
nodes.description: JSONB column on workspaces table. GET/PATCH /api/workspaces/settings returns/merges screenshot mode and data capture toggles. Extension syncs on recording start via SYNC_SETTINGS.

nodes.label: Supabase Auth Flow
nodes.description: Email/password login → ES256 JWT (access_token + refresh_token). Extension stores in chrome.storage.local; platform in sessionStorage. Backend validates via supabase.auth.getUser(). Silent refresh on 401.

nodes.label: API Client (platform/lib/api/client.ts)
nodes.description: Typed fetch wrappers get<T>(), post<T>(), patch<T>() used by the Next.js platform to call the NestJS backend.

nodes.label: Extension Design System
nodes.description: CSS custom property tokens: --qa-brand #5b5fc7 (indigo), dark header #0f1124, gradient record (green) and stop (red) buttons. All content.js styles prefixed qa- with !important.

nodes.label: Supabase Storage (Screenshots)
nodes.description: Private bucket for screenshot uploads. Accessed only via signed URLs. Backend uploads on issue creation.
